title: Sichuan Opera
html:
Sichuan Opera

Stub. First mentioned in 2024 09 25 things to do in chengdu.

Traditional Chinese opera form from chengdu / Sichuan — famous for the bian lian (face-changing) technique. Performed at Shufeng Yayun Teahouse and Jinjiang Theater.
